nasb.text: I say, ‘Your counsel and strength for the war are only empty words.’ Now on whom do you rely, that you have rebelled against me?

esv.text: Do you think that mere words are strategy and power for war? In whom do you now trust, that you have rebelled against me?

cnv.text: 我說：你打仗所用的謀略和能力，不過是虛話罷了。你到底倚靠誰，以致你背叛我呢？

ccb.text: 你所谓的战略和军力不过是空话。你究竟倚靠谁，竟敢背叛我？

csbs.text: 你说你有作战的谋略和实力，但那只是嘴上的空谈！你现在依靠谁，竟敢背叛我！’
